
---
title: "MENACE"
author: "Aleksandra"
date: "2026-08-31"
categories: [math, interactive]
description: ""
title-block-banner: true
include-in-header: libs.html
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false

source("menace_helpers.R")

render_menace_plot(
  controls_html    = create_menace_controls(),
  board_html       = create_menace_board(),
  curve_html       = create_menace_curve(),
  collection_html  = create_menace_collection(),
  move2_html       = create_menace_move2()
)
```
